dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal interprets as SHORT (avoid investing = short underperformers of last cycle). Entry conditions: (1) Asset in top 50% of 24-month returns (proxied using returns > 0.50 to catch outperformers), (2) Price below sma_20 as regime confirmation (instead of unavailable multi-indicator regime detection), (3) Consecutive closes below MA represented by close < prev_close. Exit on reversal (close > sma_20). Position reduction on confirmation is handled via exit logic. 'Generals fight last war' rationale supports shorting yesterday's winners during regime transition.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal interprets as SHORT (avoid investing = short underperformers of last cycle). Entry conditions: (1) Asset in top 50% of 24-month returns (proxied using returns > 0.50 to catch outperformers), (2) Price below sma_20 as regime confirmation (instead of unavailable multi-indicator regime detection), (3) Consecutive closes below MA represented by close < prev_close. Exit on reversal (close > sma_20). Position reduction on confirmation is handled via exit logic. 'Generals fight last war' rationale supports shorting yesterday's winners during regime transition.

source_rule_text: A trader should avoid investing in assets that were the best performers in the previous market cycle, because generals fight the last war and portfolio managers chase yesterday's bull markets.
